name: The Perfect Pancake
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Melted Vegetable Shortening (Margarine can be substituted in a pinch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift baking powder, sugar, and salt into a bowl.
2. Add eggs, milk, and melted shortening to the dry ingredients. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Heat a frying pan or griddle over medium-high heat. Lightly grease with Pam or margarine.
4. Pour 1/4 cup of batter for each pancake onto the hot surface.
5. Cook until bubbles form on the uncooked surface and the edges become dry, then flip to golden brown on the underside.
6. Serve immediately.
Option: Adjust the amount of milk in the recipe to change the thickness of the pancakes. As you cook, add more milk to the remaining batter for a varied texture.
